mapper.select: SELECT a.accommodation_id, a.name, a.region, a.address, a.status, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_types rt WHERE rt.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id ) AS room_type_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms r WHERE r.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id ) AS room_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms r WHERE r.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS active_room_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservations rv WHERE rv.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id AND rv.status = 'PENDING' ) AS pending_reservation_count FROM accommodations a WHERE a.host_user_id = #{hostUserId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.name ASC, a.accommodation_id ASC

SELECT a.accommodation_id, a.name, a.region, a.address, a.info_text, a.check_in_time, a.check_out_time, a.status, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_types rt WHERE rt.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id ) AS room_type_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms r WHERE r.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id ) AS room_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms r WHERE r.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS active_room_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservations rv WHERE rv.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id AND rv.status = 'PENDING' ) AS pending_reservation_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_blocks rb JOIN rooms r ON r.room_id = rb.room_id WHERE r.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id AND rb.status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS active_block_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM price_policies pp WHERE pp.accommodation_id = a.accommodation_id AND pp.status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS active_price_policy_count FROM accommodations a WHERE a.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND a.host_user_id = #{hostUserId}

SELECT rt.room_type_id, rt.accommodation_id, rt.name, rt.base_capacity, rt.max_capacity, rt.base_price, rt.status, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms r WHERE r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id ) AS room_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms r WHERE r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ) AS active_room_count FROM room_types rt JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rt.accommodation_id WHERE rt.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND a.host_user_id = #{hostUserId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN rt.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, rt.name ASC, rt.room_type_id ASC

SELECT r.room_id, r.accommodation_id, r.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, r.room_code, r.status, r.memo, EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM reservation_nights rn JOIN reservations rv ON rv.reservation_id = rn.reservation_id WHERE rn.assigned_room_id = r.room_id AND rv.status IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED') AND rn.stay_date >= CURRENT_DATE() ) AS has_future_assignments FROM rooms r JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = r.accommodation_id WHERE r.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND a.host_user_id = #{hostUserId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 0 WHEN r.status = 'MAINTENANCE' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, rt.name ASC, r.room_code ASC, r.room_id ASC

SELECT a.accommodation_id, a.host_user_id, a.name, a.address, a.region, a.info_text, a.check_in_time, a.check_out_time, a.status FROM accommodations a WHERE a.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT rt.room_type_id, rt.accommodation_id, a.host_user_id, a.status AS accommodation_status, rt.name, rt.base_capacity, rt.max_capacity, rt.base_price, rt.status FROM room_types rt JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rt.accommodation_id WHERE rt.room_type_id = #{roomTypeId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT rt.room_type_id, rt.accommodation_id, a.host_user_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rt.status AS room_type_status FROM room_types rt JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = rt.accommodation_id WHERE rt.room_type_id = #{roomTypeId}

SELECT r.room_id, r.accommodation_id, a.host_user_id, r.room_type_id, r.room_code, r.status, r.memo, a.status AS accommodation_status, rt.status AS room_type_status FROM rooms r JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = r.accommodation_id JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id WHERE r.room_id = #{roomId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation_nights rn JOIN reservations rv ON rv.reservation_id = rn.reservation_id WHERE rn.assigned_room_id = #{roomId} AND rv.status IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED') AND rn.stay_date >= #{businessDate}
